145.reason: [The original code incorrectly used 'link[i]' instead of 'link[q->adj]'; 'i' is out of context here and leads to undefined behavior when trying to remove the edge from the neighbor's adjacency list.]

reasons.buggy-qwen3-max-single: 1.0 , reason:  [The original code incorrectly used 'link[i]' instead of 'link[q->adj]'; 'i' is out of context here and leads to undefined behavior when trying to remove the edge from the neighbor's adjacency list.]
